name: Mrs Fields Oatmeal Raisin Chews
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300 degrees.
2. In a medium bowl, combine flour, soda, salt and oats. Mix well and set aside.
3. In a large bowl, blend sugars with electric mixer on medium speed until combined.
4. Add butter and mix to form a grainy paste. Scrape down sides of the bowl.
5. Add honey, vanilla extract, and eggs. Mix at medium speed until light and fluffy.
6. Gradually add the flour mixture, raisins, and walnuts. Blend at low speed just until combined.
7. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls onto ungreased cookie sheets, 1 1/2 inches apart.
8. Bake for 22-24 minutes or until cookies are light golden brown.
9. Immediately transfer cookies to a cool flat surface.
